caption: A digital interface from a sports video game displays a "TOTW PRESENT" screen with a purple and magenta background. A player card for "D'ANDRE SWIFT" is centered, showing an image of the athlete in a white jersey with the number 32, labeled "HB" with a rating of "87". The top of the screen shows currency totals, including "173,037", "14,809", and "2,343,543", along with "LV 19". At the bottom, menu options include "MARK/UNMARK", "DISMISS ALL", and "BACK". In the bottom-left corner, a small picture-in-picture window shows a fair-skinned man with light-brown hair and a beard, wearing a dark blue t-shirt, speaking to the camera in a room with a decorated Christmas tree and a computer monitor in the background. Across the frames, the screen remains static while the man in the inset window continues to speak, with slight changes in his facial expressions and mouth movements.
